name: Onsa
tagline: Chromatic tuner using the built-in microphone
description: Onsa is a real-time chromatic tuner. It uses the phone's built-in microphone to detect pitch, then shows the nearest semitone, the frequency in Hz, and a cent-deviation meter on Even G2.
author: onsa

permissions.name: phone-microphone
permissions.desc: Uses the phone microphone to analyze pitch and show the nearest note on your glasses.
